3273.name: Under the Altar
3273.description: The air is dank and stale in this small chamber. A set of stone stairs climb up into darkness and a narrow hallway is to your north. From somewhere you hear water dripping.

3274.name: Tunnel Intersection
3274.description: You stand at a tunnel intersection. To the south, east and west tunnels lead off into darkness. Immediately to your north is a large, ornate door.

npcs.name: Temple guard
npcs.description: He looks like a strong, fit guard and has the look of one who has been

3275.name: Dim Tunnel
3275.description: The torches are fewer here though there is still adequate light to see by. The walls here are unadorned and damp to the touch. Tunnels lead off to the north and east.

3276.name: North End of Dim Tunnel
3276.description: The tunnel comes to an end here. You can see brightly lit chambers to your north and to your west. The tunnel extends to the south.

npcs.name: Temple guard
npcs.description: He looks like a strong, fit guard and has the look of one who has been

3277.name: Cleric`s Quarters
3277.description: This chamber, though austere, is spacious and comfortable. There are beds against the east and west walls and a large chest of drawers against the north wall. There are rugs on the floor and murals decorating the walls.

npcs.name: Temple priest
npcs.description: of his station and smells faintly of garlic.

3278.name: Guards Quarters
3278.description: Everything here is neat and tidy; a testament to the discipline of the temple guards. There are several beds lined up against one wall, a small table in the corner and a chest of drawers opposite the beds.

3279.name: East Tunnel
3279.description: The air is damp and musty here and feels heavy in your lungs. You can see moisture glistening on the tunnel walls. The purpose of this passage is unclear as it doesn't seem to go anywhere.

3280.name: Secret Chamber
3280.description: This chamber is entirely featureless with the exception of the door to the south and a very formidable door to the north.

3281.name: Inside the Vault
3281.description: This is the place where the Priests of Tynum Bar have been storing away their riches. The walls are composed of some hard substance which is not stone and isn't metal either.

npcs.name: Guardian demon
npcs.description: noticeable features of the guardian demon.  His eyes are fixed on yours.

3282.name: South Palace Way
3282.description: You stand at the western end of South Palace Way. You can see mountains to the south but the intervening terrain will not allow you to go that way. A square is to your north.

3287.name: Smithy
3287.description: The heat of the forge has warmed this room to an uncomfortable degree. Bars of iron, copper and unidentifiable alloys are stacked in neat piles. A barrel of groat shoes sits in one corner and a workbench holding some of the work in progress is against the east wall.

npcs.name: Treegol the Smith
npcs.description: breaks chains for sport in a tavern somewhere.

1619.name: Small Valley
1619.description: You have entered a small, bowl shaped valley. High Mountains surround you on all sides except the north where a small canyon mouth gapes, and the east where a gradual slope climbs to what looks to be a plateau.

3288.name: South End of Western Avenue
3288.description: Western Avenue proper terminates here but the path south continues into a narrow alley. The high wall to your west marches off to the north and south. Another road heads off to the east here.

3290.name: The Groat Pens
3290.description: The ground is torn and rutted from the trampling of the huge beasts, which serve as both saddle and draft animals to the warriors of Tynum Bar. The walls of rock form a natural corral which is broken by doorways to the north and east, and by a gate to the west.

npcs.name: Vicious groat
npcs.description: are the most salient qualities of these animals.  They always see to be in

3292.name: South Palace Way
3292.description: You are half way between the east and west ends of South Palace Way. To A featureless expanse of building prevents travel to the north. To your south you see a small house.

3294.name: South Palace Way
3294.description: You are at the eastern end of South Palace Way. The street heads off to the west. To your east are formal gardens hidden behind a high stone wall. A large square is to the north.

3264.name: A Side Street
3264.description: This little street runs from the Square of Heros on the north to Procession Path on the south. A large hillock of ice prevents travel to the west and the terrain to the east is too rough and uneven to allow passage.

3265.name: Lancing Lane
3265.description: This is a fairly hum drum little street. It leads to the Plaza of Heros on the west and continues to the east.

3266.name: Lancing Lane
3266.description: This is the eastern end of Lancing Lane. To the west you can see the lane running all the way to a distant plaza. Tynum Bar Blvd. is immediately to the south.

3267.name: Procession Path
3267.description: This is an intersection of Procession Path, Lancing Lane on the north and Rombard Way on the south. To the east you can see a large, festive square. Procession Path continues to the west.

3268.name: Rombard Road
3268.description: This is the far east extremity of Rombard Road. To the north you see Procession Path making its way from east to west. To your south is a large, drab looking building. The road continues west.

3269.name: Procession Square
3269.description: This large square is the staging area for royal processions westward to the gate. It also serves as the conclusion of returning soldiers' victory march through the streets following a successful campaign. Temple square is to the east.

3270.name: Temple Square
3270.description: You have come to a large square with exits in all four directions. To the east is a large, formidable looking pile with a large arched doorway. Roads lead off to the north, south and west.

3271.name: Temple of Tynum Bar
3271.description: The temple is a small amphitheater with many benches all facing toward a large stage to the east. In the center of the stage is a large altar.

3272.name: By the Temple Altar
3272.description: Though there are many grand mosaics on the walls and many curious artifacts here, it is the altar that immediately grabs your attention. Not that it is particularly grand, but rather because of all the rusty, brown stains all over it; LOTS of them.

npcs.name: Temple acolyte
npcs.description: He is dressed in the gray and green robes of his office.  His current task is to keep the stage nice and tidy; it doesn't look as if he has

1618.name: Narrow Canyon
1618.description: Your footsteps strike a hollow, lonely cadence in this dim narrow crack. The walls press in on you as if they were about to slam together and spread you very thinly indeed. There is are openings to the north and south. A windswept herb clings to the exposed ridge, its leaves crackling with static.

3283.name: Slave Chamber
3283.description: Straw ticks are the only furnishings in this miserable little place. The walls are of unfinished wood as is the floor. The air smells of urine and and quiet desperation.

npcs.name: Slave
npcs.description: beaten a few too many times; who has been broken by the lash.

3284.name: Arms Academy
3284.description: This place bears all the trappings of a warrior's academy. Depictions of proper fighting stances cover the walls, tumbling mats are on the floor and some charts showing strategic troop placement are tacked to a board in a corner.

npcs.name: Kremdon the Weaponsmaster
npcs.description: does it WELL.

npcs.name: Student of kremdon
npcs.description: He looks mighty serious about his subject and I dont think he likes

1621.name: Inside the Gates of Tynum Bar
1621.description: You are at a crossing of ways. To the north and south you see Western Avenue extending into the distance. Another main thoroughfare heads east and to the west is the great outdoors.

npcs.name: Frost hound
npcs.description: the loyal friend and companion of its master.  It growls as its eyes bore

e.to_room_name: Inside the Gates of Tynum Bar

npcs.name: Gateguard
npcs.description: seriously.

1623.name: North End of Western Avenue
1623.description: Western Avenue ends its northerly progress here and you can see it extending to the south. There is a small plaza directly to the east.

1624.name: Plaza of Heroes
1624.description: The main feature of this plaza is a crude statue depicting a ferocious battle waged between two warriors. There is a bench before the statue suggesting that someone might actually want to sit on it and look at the hideous thing. The entrance to a small building is to the north.

3289.name: Narrow Alley
3289.description: You have entered a narrow alley formed between buildings to your east and the wall along Western Avenue to your west. A breeze blows from the south and it carries the scent of livestock. The south end of Western Avenue is to your north.

3285.name: Rombard Road
3285.description: You have traversed roughly half the length of Rombard Road. In the distance to the north, you can see a wide road that appears to run from east to west. The smell of coal smoke and penned animals comes to you on a wind from the southwest.

3291.name: Hostler`s Shop
3291.description: Saddles, bridles and various other pieces of tack and harness fill racks and shelves in this room. To the west is the groat pens.

npcs.name: Hostler
npcs.description: He seems rather unexcitable, probably a good thing since he works with

3286.name: Rombard Road
3286.description: You can see Rombard Road's entire length marching away to the east from this vantage at its' western end. There a a small, blocky building directly to your south from the open door of which you feel a hot, dry rush of air. You can see Western Avenue directly to your west.

npcs.name: Lieutenant Karvak
npcs.description: nature of Lieutenant Karvak.  He looks tough and capable.

1625.name: Small Foyer
1625.description: This is a small, square room. There is a picture on the north wall and a small writing desk against the west wall. A curtained doorway leads to the east.

3295.name: Palace Square
3295.description: You find yourself in a large square. To the west you can see what appears to be a large temple beyond an intervening stone wall. To the east is the entrance to what is undoubtedly a palace. Streets lead off to the north and south.

3296.name: North Palace Way
3296.description: The road turns south here to enter a town square. To the east, the palace grounds are separated from the outside world by a high stone wall. North Palace way extends off to the west.

3297.name: North Palace Way
3297.description: The road extends east and west from here. To the north is a small house.

npcs.name: Lieutenant Kolvak
npcs.description: it should be.  His face bears a look of vacuous cruelty.

3299.name: Antechamber
3299.description: This small chamber is lavishly decorated with plush carpets and rich tapestries. There is a heavy looking, intricately carved bronze door set in to the west wall and a doorway to the east.

3300.name: Foyer
3300.description: This is obviously the entrance foyer to the apartments of someone of great importance. Sounds are muted by thick carpets and wall hangings of richness and great beauty. There is a door to the north and doorways leading to the south and east.

npcs.name: Maldor`s secretary
npcs.description: out in front to screen out pests.  Think it will work on you?

3301.name: Guard room
3301.description: This room is small, square and utterly functional. None of the opulence of the outer apartments have intruded here. Everything is scrupulously clean and tidy. The floor and walls are clean, smoothed stone.

npcs.name: King`s bodyguard
npcs.description: is a lot more trouble to kill than it is worth.  His quiet confidence strikes you as being the attitude of a man who knows what he can do.

3302.name: Sitting Room
3302.description: A rather nice and functional sitting room. Low divans are against the walls and there is a large table and chairs in the center of the room. The east wall is dominated by a large brick fireplace.

npcs.name: Courier
npcs.description: one who has been in many dangerious situations.  He impatiently awaits

3303.name: Audience Chamber
3303.description: This large chamber is where Maldor, King of Tynum Bar, holds court. The rich trappings of royalty surround you and leave you breathless. A huge gold inlaid, marble throne dominates the north end of the room. Thickly padded chairs provide capacity for large numbers of onlookers but (fortunately for you) they are empty right now.

npcs.name: Dragonet
npcs.description: graceful and its talons sharp.  It looks like miniature dragon.

npcs.name: King Maldor
npcs.description: sharp, cruel features and burning eyes are offset by a wide, moist mouth. He touches his tongue to his lips and smiles.

npcs.name: Rumpkin
npcs.description: When your glances lock his eyes slide away.

3304.name: Hallway
3304.description: A tightly woven and colorful runner marches away to the north and south. To the north you can see the audience chamber and to the south you can see that the hallway continues to terminate at two doorways.

3305.name: Hallway Terminus
3305.description: This hallway extends to the north. To the south is what appears to be a store room. The room to the east looks to be an office.

3306.name: Maldor`s Office
3306.description: The dominant feature of this room is the large, cluttered desk occupying its center. There are some paintings on the walls, one of them especially grand.

3307.name: Alcove
3307.description: You in a small room at the north end of a south running hall. You can a desk poking into you view when you look into the room at the south end of the hall.

1622.name: Western Avenue
1622.description: You stand on Western Avenue, which continues north and south from here. To the south you can see the gates of Tynum Bar, to the north you see that the road makes an abrupt turn to the east.

1626.name: Womens Quarters
1626.description: The floor is carpeted here giving the place a soft, comfortable atmosphere. Small wicker tables and chairs are scattered throughout and cheerful, vacuous artwork adorns the walls. There is a smell of tea and baked goods in the air.

npcs.name: Servant
npcs.description: beaten a few too many times; who has been broken by the lash.
